'''''Star Wars: X-Wing: Rogue Leader''''' is a three-issue series of comics published by Dark Horse Comics. It takes place one week after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. The first issue came out on [[September 28]], [[2005]]. This comic series comes directly before the series [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'']].

==Plot summary==
''The greatest [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] become the defenders of a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in this massive collection of stories featuring [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], hero of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and his team of ace [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] known throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]!''

''Meet the Rogues for the first time and learn the fate of the galaxy immediately after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] as the Rebellion's best pilots battle [[Imperial Remnant|remnants of the Empire]] wherever its ugly agenda of fear and domination appears.
